No, we base the values on the source in preference to calculating them. (In this case the source is down, so it's using the archive.) Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1357728201|1357728201]] by [[Special:Contributions/Emilc2|Emilc2]] ([[User talk:Emilc2|talk]])

Updated Aphelion, Perihelion and Semi-major axis based on Reference 3, and calculated Eccentricity ≡ (A-P)/(A+P) to 4 significant digits since A-P has 4 significant digits, where A is Aphelion and P is Perihelion.
Changed Eccentricity from 0.0489 to 0.0487 calculated by (A-P)/(A+P) where A is Aphelion and P is Perihelion.
